No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to poverty eradication, economic resources for the poor, or social protection systems.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to urban planning, housing, transport, heritage, or disaster resilience.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to sustainable consumption, resource efficiency, waste reduction, or sustainable tourism.

Climate Action.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to climate change, emissions, or resilience to climate hazards.

Life Below Water.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.
